markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review weekly progress, identify blockers, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Refresh Workflow Blocker:** The current refresh pipeline is inefficient, requiring manual SERP analysis. Team members will submit tickets to request a SERP-scanning feature, with Jo's support to amplify the request.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [**Outreach.io Strategy Pivot:** A "refresh" task for Outreach.io is now a net-new article. The old URL will be redirected to a new, evergreen slug (`/sales-trends/`), preventing content cannibalization and preserving link equity.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [**Internal Linking Pause:** Internal linking is paused for the Smith account. A planned URL migration to a new Webflow template would break any new links, making the work redundant.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [**Ambient/Abnormal Priority:** The immediate focus is fixing existing artifacts and recovering traffic from previously removed URLs. Jo will also refine the keyword strategy to be more product-focused.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

## Topics

### Workflow & Tooling Blockers

  - [**Inefficient Refresh Process:** The current pipeline requires manual SERP analysis to create competitive outlines, which conflicts with the expectation of minimal assignment direction.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [**Solution:** Jenn's Cloud project provides a temporary workaround by comparing draft markdown against top SERP results.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [**Agentic Pipeline Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
      - [A new conflict-check test is required for artifacts vs. assignment direction.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
      - [The Superhuman editorial checklist template is available in the internal channel to help complete the new checklist.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)

### Client Strategy & Production

#### Outreach.io

  - [**Problem:** A "refresh" task was misaligned. The new content (a 2026 sales trends forecast) was intended to update an old URL (`/sales-2024-data-analysis/`) that was a 2024 data analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [**Decision:** Pivot to a net-new article.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [**New Slug:** `/sales-trends/` (evergreen).](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
      - [**Action:** Request a 301 redirect from the old URL to the new one to preserve link equity.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

#### Ambient & Abnormal

  - [**Status:** Final edits are pending for both accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [**Artifacts:** The new "Pulsar" feature is reflected in the updated artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [**Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
      - [**Immediate:** Fix existing artifacts and recover traffic from previously removed URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
      - [**Strategic:** Jo will refine the keyword strategy to be more product-focused.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

#### Smith

  - [**Status:** Usman will submit publishing tickets for 3 articles by EOD Friday/Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**Internal Linking:** Paused due to a planned URL migration to a new Webflow template.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [**Content Quality:**](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [Usman uses a Claude prompt to remove overly enthusiastic competitor mentions from Atlas drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [**New Directive:** Reinforce internal linking to long-tail "roleplay software" pages (e.g., insurance, medical) to lift their rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

#### Exec

  - [**Status:** 3 articles are nearly complete (adding internal links).](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**Publishing:** Tickets will be submitted by EOD Friday/Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**URL Change:** The "Software Roleplay" article requires a URL update to match its new primary keyword: "sales roleplay software."](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

      - [Submit tickets requesting a SERP-scanning feature for the refresh pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/XTzMohc1k-_H1rv9juPfGZCu-68cfer8?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
